boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: direct deposit update missing payroll portal re-authentication.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close exact boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing MFA identity and effective date
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Unresolved current MFA payroll identity plus bank effective date

critical_features_preserved: current MFA payroll identity plus bank effective date
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the current MFA payroll identity and bank effective date are unresolved, so the exact source boundary remains open. Policy requires current source records to close the boundary before execution. Escalate to resolve the dependency using only the packet’s records.
open_blockers: current MFA payroll identity plus bank effective date
